description: Etsy niche research whose scores come with their evidence attached — seeded search, honest confidence, and a local store that turns repeat research into trends.

novel_features.name: Evidence-aware niche verdict
novel_features.description: Score an Etsy niche from a seed keyword and get the evidence behind the score, not just the number.

novel_features.name: Batch sub-niche discovery
novel_features.description: Expand a parent niche into child niches and rank them on comparable, normalized scores.

novel_features.name: Competitor sampling
novel_features.description: Get the market shape of a niche: result count, median price, review and sales density, listing-age quartiles.

novel_features.name: Tag and title consensus with seasonality
novel_features.description: See which tags and title tokens the winning listings in a niche agree on, and whether demand is seasonal or evergreen when EverBee supplies trend data.

novel_features.name: Niche drift vs baseline
novel_features.description: Compare a niche against a saved baseline to see what actually moved since last time.

novel_features.name: Listing and handle identity resolution
novel_features.description: Resolve an Etsy listing URL or ID to what we actually know about it, and say so plainly when we know nothing.

novel_features.name: Semantic capability self-test
novel_features.description: Check that the research path is not just reachable but actually returning relevant data.
